message:
🐛 fix: suppress GA4 auth error for unauthenticated requests (#9988)

The 'No authentication token available' error is expected behavior
when unauthenticated users visit protected pages. Emitting it as a
GA4 error causes false-positive monitoring alerts (#9968, #9979,
#9980, #9984).

Fixes #9968
Fixes #9979
Fixes #9980
Fixes #9984

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
